title: Hypothesis Verdict Synthesis: Cross-Experiment Evidence Mapping for Paper Discussion
summary: Demo notebook for the cross-experiment evidence mapping evaluation. Loads pre-computed results from 4 upstream experiments (synthetic module recovery, real benchmark, frustration meta-diagnostic, scalability) and re-derives definitive verdicts for 4 hypothesis success criteria: SC1 PARTIALLY_CONFIRMED (Jaccard=0.557), SC2 PARTIALLY_CONFIRMED (accuracy comparable, arity higher), SC3 DISCONFIRMED (rho=-0.108, p=0.714), SC4 CONFIRMED (max time 8.1 min < 30 min). Includes contribution claims, assumption validation, limitations catalogue, narrative arc, and a 4-panel visualization summarizing all verdicts and key metrics. Uses 24 examples across 8 datasets from mini_demo_data.json (16KB).
